parameters.content:
## AI Output Quality Sampler

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL and YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set QUALITY_SAMPLE_EMAIL_TO
3. Provide a sample of recent AI workflow outputs
4. LLM evaluates output quality on accuracy, format, usefulness dimensions
5. Approval gate before quality report is shared

parameters.subject: =APPROVAL REQUIRED: AI Quality Report — avg {{ $json.meta.avg_overall_score }}/5 across {{ $json.meta.sample_count }} samples
=AI Output Quality: avg {{ $('Format Quality Report').first().json.meta.avg_overall_score }}/5 — {{ $('Format Quality Report').first().json.meta.sample_count }} samples
